description: A side-by-side pair of satellite images of a reservoir in a desert landscape, labeled 'August 2017' on the left and 'August 2022' on the right, with place labels reading 'Bullfrog Creek', 'Bullfrog' and 'Halls Creek'. The dark water body is noticeably smaller and more shrunken in the 2022 image. A 2 km scale bar appears at lower left.
notable_text: August 2017; August 2022; Bullfrog Creek; Halls Creek
